meta.title: Soul Age Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover your soul's true age! Answer 12 deep questions to find out how many lifetimes your soul has lived.

app.title: Soul Age Test
app.subtitle: How old is your soul?
app.description: Answer 12 deep questions to discover your soul's true age. Are you a fresh new soul or an ancient transcendent being?

q1.text: What draws you to a new place?
q1.b: Meeting new people and fitting in
q1.d: Feeling a strange sense of having been there before

q2.b: Try to win by following the rules
q2.c: Seek a compromise that considers all sides
q2.d: Observe silently, knowing it will resolve itself

q3.d: Inner peace and understanding the universe

q4.text: A child asks 'Why do we exist?'
q4.d: That's the beautiful mystery, isn't it?

q5.b: The present — making the most of now

q6.text: How do you feel about death?
q6.b: It motivates me to achieve more

q7.text: What kind of music moves you?

q8.text: When meeting someone new, you first notice...
q8.d: Their eyes — the window to their soul

q9.c: Quality time with close friends, reflection

q10.text: How do you feel about rules and authority?
q10.a: Rules are boring, I do what I want
q10.c: I follow my own moral compass
q10.d: Rules are human constructs; truth is internal

q11.text: You have a vivid dream. You think...
q11.b: I wonder what it means for my goals
q11.c: It's showing me something about my inner world
q11.d: My soul is remembering other lifetimes

q12.b: Time is money — use it wisely
q12.c: Time is cyclical — what goes around comes around
q12.d: Time is an illusion — all moments exist at once

infant.name: Infant Soul
infant.desc: Your soul is fresh and new! You experience life with pure excitement and wonder. Everything is an adventure, and you dive into the world with fearless curiosity.

young.name: Young Soul
young.desc: Your soul is ambitious and driven. You're here to prove yourself and make your mark on the world. Success, achievement, and recognition fuel your fire.

mature.name: Mature Soul
mature.desc: Your soul has lived many lives. You seek deep connections, understand complex emotions, and value personal growth over material success.

old.name: Old Soul
old.desc: Your soul carries ancient wisdom. You see the bigger picture, value peace over ambition, and often feel like you don't quite belong in this modern world.

transcendent.name: Transcendent Soul
transcendent.desc: Your soul is nearing the end of its earthly journey. You exist between worlds, seeing through illusions, and radiating a calm that others can feel.

share.title: Share Your Soul Age
share.text: My soul is {age} years old! I'm a "{tier}" 🔮 Discover your soul's age:
